title: TTS
description: Look up @you/tts invocation examples, the local omnivoice resource, and the parent Packaged Factory Reference definition.

overview.title: @you/tts
overview.body: Converts requested text into speech with a local omnivoice model worker.

invocationExamples.title: Invocation examples
invocationExamples.body: Pass the text to speak as a positional argument, on stdin, or through a text-oriented heredoc. The packaged MODEL_INVOKE TTS operation binds that text input to the local omnivoice worker.

resource.title: Local model resource
resource.body: tts uses a capacity-1 local omnivoice model resource (omnivoice-cache / ON_DEMAND local backend).

parentDefinition.title: Complete definition
parentDefinition.body: The generated Packaged Factory Reference keeps the unabridged factory.json for this package.

deterministicReplay.title: Deterministic replay
deterministicReplay.body: Inspect a full-mode deterministic work-graph replay for the packaged tts recording: timeline scrubber, topology, and work progress.
